method: MLC q4f16_1 (community baseline, mlc_llm convert_weight on stock HF TinyLlama)

bench.prompt: Write a short poem about the ocean and the moonlight in simple words that a child could read and enjoy as a bedtime story now please.
bench.source: MLCChat custom debug build (mlc_llm 0.20.dev162) on-device chat UI

ppl_source: Not measured in this session. Community model card cites WikiText-2 PPL ~7.7 on full eval; not directly comparable to TRIAD's 11.477 because eval window differs (TRIAD uses the same 4-batch reduced window as the FP16 baseline 10.882). On the SAME eval window the reference would be expected within +/- 0.2 of the FP16 baseline.
